blocks.text: Prepared for {{fact:f:E-1998-001.client}} by Cindergrove Advisors Inc. Presented by Kimberly Price, Senior Consultant.

items: Sponsor: Adam Cook, Director of Operations, Ramos, Gill and Garcia
Scope: flow of product from plants through warehouses to customers
Emphasis on freight cost, delay, and documentation practice
Freight and shipping records assembled and tabulated
Warehouse walk-throughs completed by Andrea Diaz
Interviews with scheduling supervisors under way
Working papers current and reviewed weekly
Carrier selection varies by warehouse; no common rate reference in use
Split shipments appear more often than order patterns would require
Documentation practices differ from one location to the next
Complete supervisor interviews and the baseline cost analysis
Review findings with the client before the steering committee meets
Issue an interim findings memorandum for comment
